mapper.update: UPDATE pay_order SET payment_status = #{status}, third_transaction_no = #{thirdNo}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, last_query_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND payment_status IN (0, 10)
UPDATE pay_order SET last_query_time = #{time}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
